title: poncirus trifoliata var. monstrosa
intro: Poncirus trifoliata var. monstrosa, also known as the Monstrosa or Flying Dragon Chinese Citrus, is a cultivar of the Poncirus trifoliata plant, a type of thorny evergreen shrub or small tree in the citrus family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Poncirus trifoliata var. monstrosa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and extracts, making it a versatile and useful medicinal plant in traditional Chinese medicine.
